name: SBI Card PRIME

milestones.label: Pizza Hut e-Gift Voucher worth Rs 1,000 on quarterly spends of Rs 50,000
E-Gift Voucher worth Rs 7,000 from Yatra.com or Pantaloons on annual spends of Rs 5 lakh

milestoneBenefits: Pizza Hut e-Gift Voucher worth Rs 1,000 on quarterly spends of Rs 50,000
Renewal fee waived on annual spends of Rs 3 lakh
E-Gift Voucher worth Rs 7,000 from Yatra.com or Pantaloons on annual spends of Rs 5 lakh

joiningBenefitsValued.label: Welcome e-Gift Voucher worth Rs 3,000 from select brands (including Yatra, Shoppers Stop, Marks & Spencer, Bata, and Hush Puppies)

renewalBenefitsValued.label: If not waived, 12,000 bonus Reward Points are credited upon payment of the renewal fee

joiningBenefits: Welcome e-Gift Voucher worth Rs 3,000 from select brands (including Yatra, Shoppers Stop, Marks & Spencer, Bata, and Hush Puppies)
E-voucher is sent within 15-20 days of joining fee payment
renewalBenefits: Annual renewal fee is waived on annual spends of Rs 3 Lakh in the preceding year
If not waived, 12,000 bonus Reward Points (worth Rs 3,000) are credited upon payment of the renewal fee
additionalBenefits: Complimentary Club Vistara Silver membership (1 complimentary upgrade voucher + 9 CV points per Rs 100 spent on flights)
Complimentary Trident Privilege Red Tier membership (1,000 welcome points + 1,500 bonus points on first stay)
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-02
Audited against official SBI Card product page, PRIME card T&C booklet, customer notice dated 1 Aug 2025, and MITC page on 2026-06-02.
Effective 15 Jul 2025, complimentary air accident insurance coverage (previously Rs 50 Lakhs) is discontinued.
Effective 1 Sep 2025, reward accrual on digital gaming platforms/merchants and government related transactions is discontinued.
Effective 1 Apr 2026, reward point redemption for statement credit is capped at a maximum of 60,000 points per month, and redemptions must be made in fixed multiples/blocks of 4,000 points.
